A day in the life of zThrice: Wakes up at 6am because his kids need to get ready for school. Leaves for his HVAC job where he is fixin' ACs and showing his butt crack. He gets home. His wife has been cooking his steak all day to perfection. He then gets on to ban people for speaking the truth in fl0m's chat. It's a good life. Loving family. Good job. But chat's love eludes him. He goes to bed after eating his second well-done steak with extra A1 sauce. Life's okay.
